name: webclaudecode
description: Cloud/web-delivered Claude Code — drive the real Claude Code on your own machine from a browser.
comment: exFAT drive: NO npm/pnpm workspaces (symlinks unsupported). All deps live HERE in the root node_modules; cross-package imports resolve via aliases (tsconfig paths / vitest / esbuild / vite). See docs/issues/ISSUES.md #8.
